name: bitbucket
description: Reads Bitbucket Cloud repositories, branches, commits, tags, pull requests, issues, pipelines, deployments, downloads metadata, webhooks, branch restrictions, projects, and snippets; exposes approval-gated write plans for selected repository, issue, pull request, pipeline, webhook, branch restriction, and snippet mutations.

risk.read: Bitbucket Cloud REST API reads scoped to the configured workspace/repository; binary payloads and local git workflows are not executed.
risk.write: Selected Bitbucket mutations are explicit reverse ETL actions only; destructive/admin/sensitive operations are blocked or require typed confirmation metadata.
risk.approval: Reverse ETL writes require plan, preview, approval, execute; destructive/admin operations require typed confirmation when exposed.
